description_long: This is a pair of sturdy, dark brown combat-style boots with a matte finish and visible yellow stitching along the sole. The boots feature a high ankle design, reinforced toe caps, and a thick, robust sole suitable for urban environments. Black laces are threaded through multiple metal eyelets, and the laces are tied at the top, with some excess lace hanging loosely. The back of the boots displays a vertical strip, possibly a pull tab, with yellow accents. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for extended wear. The boots appear clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of dark brown, high-ankle combat boots with black laces, yellow stitching, and a rugged, durable build. The boots are clean, sturdy, and designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rounded toe, black laces, and yellow-stitched sole.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical lacing and reinforced toe caps.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the high ankle, yellow stitching, and the vertical strip at the back.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the vertical pull tab with yellow accents and the boot's heel structure.
